title: The Trapp Family
writer: Georg Hurdalek, Herbert Reinecker, Maria von Trapp
actors: Ruth Leuwerik, Hans Holt, Maria Holst
plot: A novice nun, Maria, is sent to care for the unruly children of a wealthy baron. The baron and Maria fall in love, Maria leaves the convent, and they marry. Under Maria's guidance the family becomes a nationally acclaimed singing ...
